news.t: Defiance Launches NVOX, the First 2X Leveraged Single-Stock ETF on Novo Nordisk

holdings.infoBox: NVOX is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are NOVO-NORDISK SWAP MS stock at 55.49%, NOVO-NORDISK SWAP NBC-L at 27.61%, NOVO-NORDISK SWAP MAREX at 25.40%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 25.14%, and NOVO-NORDISK INC SWAP CANTOR at 24.84%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long NVO ETF (NVOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of NOVO Nordisk A/S - ADR (NVO), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. NVOX was launched on Dec 2, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches NVOX, the First 2X Leveraged Single-Stock ETF on Novo Nordisk
data.text: MIAMI, Dec. 03, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today launched NVOX, the world's first single-stock leveraged ETF for the pharmaceutical stock Novo Nordisk (NYSE: NVO). As the weight loss marke...
